text: Meanwhile the build track kept moving: **`probe oracle / simulate / why / state` all landed green** (456 lib tests, +20). The essay's boldest line — *"the check that proves the engine honest ships inside the engine… so I can point it at the running system"* — is now literally true: `probe oracle` runs the full-recompute oracle against the live daemon graphs, and `probe simulate` dry-runs a fact via `tx.preview()` with a test proving the graph is untouched. Next I'll have a Fable agent stress-test whether the whole surface is genuinely useful/complete/real before I call the essay done.
